ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team owner */,
  "team_value" REAL /* Current team value */,
  "chip" TEXT /* Chip usage status (e.g., None, Wildcard) */,
  "team_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the team was created */,
  "team_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team */,
  "total_transfers" INTEGER /* Total number of transfers made by the team */,
  "total_chips_used" INTEGER /* Total number of chips used by the team */,
  "current_gameweek" INTEGER /* Current gameweek for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the owner account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the owner account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the owner (e.g., Team Owner, League Admin, Analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Midfielder, Defender) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player was added to the team */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player's information */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Total clean sheets by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gameweeks" (
  "gameweek_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gameweek */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team in this gameweek */,
  "bench" INTEGER /* Bench points scored by the team in this gameweek */,
  "gw_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in this gameweek */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the gameweek data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the gameweek data */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team up to this gameweek */,
  "total_bench_points" INTEGER /* Total bench points scored by the team up to this gameweek */,
  "gw_value" REAL /* Team value at the end of this gameweek */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gameweek_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gameweeks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "gameweek_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gameweek when the transfer was made */,
  "player_in" INTEGER /* ID of the player transferred in */,
  "player_out" INTEGER /* ID of the player transferred out */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transfer was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the transfer */,
  "transfer_cost" REAL /* Cost of the transfer */,
  "transfer_status" TEXT /* Status of the transfer (e.g., Completed, Pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_out FOREIGN KEY ("player_out") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_in FOREIGN KEY ("player_in") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chip_usage" (
  "chip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chip usage event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "gameweek_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gameweek when the chip was used */,
  "chip_type" TEXT /* Type of chip used (e.g., Wildcard, Free Hit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the chip was used */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the chip usage */,
  "chip_effect" TEXT /* Effect of the chip (e.g., Extra Transfers, Double Points) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chip_usage_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Current overall rank of the team */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the standings were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the standings */,
  "gw_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the current gameweek */,
  "gw_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team in the current gameweek */,
  "gw_value" REAL /* Team value at the end of the current gameweek */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "gameweek_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gameweek when the statistic was recorded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in this gameweek */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the statistics were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the statistics */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the player in this gameweek */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in this gameweek */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Clean sheets by the player in this gameweek */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Yellow cards received by the player in this gameweek */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Red cards received by the player in this gameweek */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_gameweek_id FOREIGN KEY ("gameweek_id") REFERENCES gameweeks ("gameweek_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
